audit_items.proof_trace: `_getAssetOutAmount` takes `amountIn`, `assetInUsdPrice`, `elapsedTime`, and auction params — no balance parameter and no `balanceOf` call inside the function (L777-803). In `bid()`, `IERC20(asset).balanceOf(address(this))` is used only as a cap guard (`amount > availableBalance → revert`); the user-specified `amount` (not the balance) is passed directly to `_getAssetOutAmount`. Arbitrary deposits relax the cap but do not affect the assetOutAmount calculation for any given `amount`.
